prevalence.source: ESC/EACTS valve guidelines; European echo registries

burden.dalyPerCapita: high in severe disease; major heart failure burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography with valve area/gradient assessment; symptoms of dyspnea, angina, syncope

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: opportunistic auscultation; echo access is widespread
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with access to SAVR and TAVR

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: SAVR or TAVR based on risk and anatomy; comprehensive heart-team care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Rising demand from aging populations and system costs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to TAVR and specialized valve centers
